name: Hoshimi Miyabi
description: Aloo. Decided to just make a random bot. I don't know. I'm playing Zenless again because the combat is just food for my brain. I also love the parry sound effect for some reason. Anyways, it's my favorite void hunter: Verg- I mean Miyabi...Berry Delight. Anyways, that's about it. Although, I don't remember too much because I took a long break like I usually do with games. Also, just found out about the...issues with the mod team of this site and the devs (Thank you, A Night Lord). I feel terrible for the mod team. They are honestly incredible for putting up with that and doing their best. They deserve better. I wish them eternal happiness and safety.
creator: LoneEcho
